Event: The Arcane Adventure
Event Date: 08/08/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR299
Witch Hunter Gear

When taking damage, the unit has a 25% chance to frighten 3 random enemy units for 4 sec and deal 975000 physical damage to them. The armor wearer recovers health equal to 60% of the damage dealt by the ability. Can be triggered once in 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
